sourcesContent:
// Static recipe data — 14 realistic recipes
// Each recipe includes: id, name, image, ingredients, instructions, tags

const recipes = [
  {
    id: 1,
    name: "Classic Spaghetti ",
    image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1612874742237-6526221588e3?w=600&q=80",
    tags: ["pasta", "italian", "quick"],
    ingredients: [
      "Spaghetti  -  250g",
      "Olive oil  -  3 tbsp",
      "garlic  -  4-5 cloves",
      "Tomato paste  -  2 tbsp",
      "Pasta water  -  1/2 cup",
      "Salt & Chilli Flakes to taste",
      "Parmesan cheese (optional)",
    ],
    instructions: [
      "Bring a large pot of salted water to boil. Cook spaghetti until al dente.",
      "While pasta cooks, fry bacon in a large pan over medium heat until crispy. Add minced garlic and cook 1 minute.",
      "Whisk together eggs, grated parmesan, and plenty of black pepper in a bowl.",
      "Reserve 1 cup pasta water, then drain pasta. Remove pan from heat.",
      "Add pasta to the bacon pan. Pour egg mixture over pasta, tossing quickly and adding pasta water a splash at a time to create a creamy sauce.",
      "Serve immediately topped with extra parmesan and black pepper.",
    ],
  },
  {
    id: 2,
    name: "Chicken Stir-Fry",
    image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1512058564366-18510be2db19?w=600&q=80",
    tags: ["chicken", "asian", "quick"],
    ingredients: [
      "chicken breast",
      "bell pepper",
      "broccoli",
      "soy sauce",
      "garlic",
      "ginger",
      "sesame oil",
      "cornstarch",
      "vegetable oil",
      "green onions",
    ],
    instructions: [
      "Slice chicken breast thinly and toss with cornstarch, a splash of soy sauce, and salt.",
      "Heat vegetable oil in a wok or large skillet over high heat.",
      "Add chicken and stir-fry until golden and cooked through, about 4 minutes. Set aside.",
      "In the same pan, stir-fry garlic and ginger for 30 seconds. Add broccoli and bell pepper.",
      "Cook vegetables 3–4 minutes until tender-crisp. Return chicken to pan.",
      "Add remaining soy sauce and sesame oil. Toss to coat. Garnish with green onions.",
    ],
  },
  {
    id: 3,
    name: "Avocado Toast with Poached Eggs",
    image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1525351484163-7529414344d8?w=600&q=80",
    tags: ["breakfast", "vegetarian", "quick"],
    ingredients: [
      "bread",
      "avocado",
      "eggs",
      "lemon juice",
      "red pepper flakes",
      "salt",
      "black pepper",
      "olive oil",
    ],
    instructions: [
      "Toast bread slices until golden and firm.",
      "Halve avocado, remove pit, and scoop flesh into a bowl. Mash with lemon juice, salt, and pepper.",
      "Bring a small pot of water to a gentle simmer. Add a splash of vinegar.",
      "Crack each egg into a small cup, then slide gently into the simmering water. Cook 3 minutes for a runny yolk.",
      "Spread mashed avocado on toast. Top with a poached egg.",
      "Drizzle with olive oil, sprinkle red pepper flakes, and season with salt and pepper.",
    ],
  },
  {
    id: 4,
    name: "Tomato Basil Soup",
    image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1547592166-23ac45744acd?w=600&q=80",
    tags: ["soup", "vegetarian", "comfort"],
    ingredients: [
      "tomatoes",
      "onion",
      "garlic",
      "vegetable broth",
      "basil",
      "olive oil",
      "cream",
      "salt",
      "black pepper",
      "sugar",
    ],
    instructions: [
      "Heat olive oil in a large pot. Sauté diced onion until softened, about 5 minutes. Add garlic and cook 1 minute.",
      "Add chopped tomatoes (or canned), vegetable broth, sugar, salt, and pepper. Bring to a boil.",
      "Reduce heat and simmer 20 minutes until tomatoes are very soft.",
      "Use an immersion blender to blend soup until smooth. Alternatively, blend in batches.",
      "Stir in cream and fresh basil. Taste and adjust seasoning.",
      "Serve hot with crusty bread on the side.",
    ],
  },
  {
    id: 5,
    name: "Greek Salad",
    image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1540189549336-e6e99c3679fe?w=600&q=80",
    tags: ["salad", "vegetarian", "mediterranean", "quick"],
    ingredients: [
      "cucumber",
      "tomatoes",
      "red onion",
      "feta cheese",
      "olives",
      "olive oil",
      "lemon juice",
      "oregano",
      "salt",
      "black pepper",
    ],
    instructions: [
      "Chop cucumber, tomatoes, and red onion into bite-sized chunks.",
      "Combine all vegetables in a large bowl. Add olives.",
      "In a small bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, oregano, salt, and pepper.",
      "Pour dressing over salad and toss gently.",
      "Top with crumbled or sliced feta cheese. Serve immediately.",
    ],
  },
  {
    id: 6,
    name: "Beef Tacos",
    image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1565299585323-38d6b0865b47?w=600&q=80",
    tags: ["mexican", "beef", "quick"],
    ingredients: [
      "ground beef",
      "taco shells",
      "onion",
      "garlic",
      "tomatoes",
      "lettuce",
      "cheddar cheese",
      "sour cream",
      "cumin",
      "chili powder",
      "salt",
    ],
    instructions: [
      "Heat a skillet over medium-high heat. Brown ground beef, breaking it apart.",
      "Drain excess fat. Add diced onion and garlic; cook until softened.",
      "Season with cumin, chili powder, and salt. Stir to combine.",
      "Warm taco shells in the oven at 350°F for 5 minutes.",
      "Fill shells with beef mixture. Top with shredded lettuce, diced tomatoes, shredded cheese, and sour cream.",
    ],
  },
  {
    id: 7,
    name: "Mushroom Risotto",
    image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1476124369491-e7addf5db371?w=600&q=80",
    tags: ["italian", "vegetarian", "comfort"],
    ingredients: [
      "arborio rice",
      "mushrooms",
      "onion",
      "garlic",
      "vegetable broth",
      "white wine",
      "parmesan cheese",
      "butter",
      "olive oil",
      "thyme",
      "salt",
      "black pepper",
    ],
    instructions: [
      "Heat broth in a separate pot and keep warm on low heat.",
      "In a wide pan, heat olive oil and butter. Sauté onion until translucent. Add garlic.",
      "Add sliced mushrooms and thyme; cook until mushrooms release their moisture.",
      "Add arborio rice and stir to toast for 2 minutes. Pour in white wine and stir until absorbed.",
      "Add warm broth one ladle at a time, stirring constantly and waiting until each addition is absorbed before adding more.",
      "After about 18–20 minutes, rice should be creamy and al dente. Stir in parmesan and remaining butter. Season and serve.",
    ],
  },
  {
    id: 8,
    name: "Banana Pancakes",
    image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1528207776546-365bb710ee93?w=600&q=80",
    tags: ["breakfast", "sweet", "vegetarian"],
    ingredients: [
      "bananas",
      "eggs",
      "flour",
      "milk",
      "butter",
      "baking powder",
      "sugar",
      "salt",
      "vanilla extract",
    ],
    instructions: [
      "Mash ripe bananas in a large bowl until smooth.",
      "Whisk in eggs, milk, melted butter, sugar, and vanilla extract.",
      "In a separate bowl, combine flour, baking powder, and salt. Fold dry ingredients into wet just until combined.",
      "Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat. Lightly grease with butter.",
      "Pour ¼ cup batter per pancake. Cook until bubbles form on the surface, then flip and cook 1 more minute.",
      "Serve with maple syrup, fresh fruit, or yogurt.",
    ],
  },
  {
    id: 9,
    name: "Lentil Dal",
    image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1546549032-9571cd6b27df?w=600&q=80",
    tags: ["indian", "vegetarian", "vegan", "comfort"],
    ingredients: [
      "red lentils",
      "tomatoes",
      "onion",
      "garlic",
      "ginger",
      "vegetable broth",
      "cumin",
      "turmeric",
      "coriander",
      "coconut milk",
      "salt",
      "vegetable oil",
      "cilantro",
    ],
    instructions: [
      "Rinse red lentils thoroughly under cold water.",
      "Heat oil in a pot. Sauté diced onion until golden. Add garlic and ginger, cook 1 minute.",
      "Add cumin, turmeric, and coriander; stir for 30 seconds until fragrant.",
      "Add lentils, diced tomatoes, and vegetable broth. Bring to a boil.",
      "Reduce heat and simmer 20–25 minutes until lentils are completely soft.",
      "Stir in coconut milk and season with salt. Garnish with fresh cilantro. Serve with rice or naan.",
    ],
  },
  {
    id: 10,
    name: "Caesar Salad",
    image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1550304943-4f24f54ddde9?w=600&q=80",
    tags: ["salad", "quick", "classic"],
    ingredients: [
      "romaine lettuce",
      "parmesan cheese",
      "bread",
      "garlic",
      "olive oil",
      "lemon juice",
      "eggs",
      "anchovy paste",
      "worcestershire sauce",
      "black pepper",
      "salt",
    ],
    instructions: [
      "Make croutons: cube bread, toss with olive oil and garlic, bake at 375°F for 12 minutes until golden.",
      "Whisk together egg yolk, lemon juice, anchovy paste, worcestershire sauce, and garlic to form a dressing.",
      "Slowly drizzle in olive oil while whisking continuously until emulsified. Season with salt and pepper.",
      "Tear romaine lettuce into large pieces. Toss with dressing until well coated.",
      "Add croutons and generous shavings of parmesan. Toss gently and serve immediately.",
    ],
  },
  {
    id: 11,
    name: "Shrimp Fried Rice",
    image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1563245372-f21724e3856d?w=600&q=80",
    tags: ["asian", "seafood", "quick"],
    ingredients: [
      "shrimp",
      "cooked rice",
      "eggs",
      "peas",
      "carrots",
      "soy sauce",
      "garlic",
      "ginger",
      "sesame oil",
      "vegetable oil",
      "green onions",
    ],
    instructions: [
      "Peel and devein shrimp. Pat dry and season with salt and pepper.",
      "Heat vegetable oil in a wok over high heat. Cook shrimp 2 minutes per side. Remove and set aside.",
      "In the same wok, scramble eggs until just set. Push to the side.",
      "Add garlic and ginger; sauté 30 seconds. Add peas and carrots; stir-fry 2 minutes.",
      "Add cold cooked rice, breaking up any clumps. Stir-fry until heated through.",
      "Return shrimp to the wok. Add soy sauce and sesame oil. Toss well. Garnish with green onions.",
    ],
  },
  {
    id: 12,
    name: "Margherita Pizza",
    image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1604382354936-07c5d9983bd3?w=600&q=80",
    tags: ["italian", "vegetarian", "classic"],
    ingredients: [
      "flour",
      "yeast",
      "tomatoes",
      "mozzarella cheese",
      "basil",
      "olive oil",
      "garlic",
      "salt",
      "sugar",
    ],
    instructions: [
      "Mix flour, yeast, sugar, salt, and olive oil. Gradually add warm water and knead for 10 minutes. Let rise 1 hour.",
      "Blend tomatoes with garlic, olive oil, and salt to make sauce.",
      "Preheat oven to its highest setting (ideally 500°F+) with a pizza stone or baking sheet inside.",
      "Stretch dough into a thin circle on a floured surface.",
      "Spread tomato sauce, add torn mozzarella slices, and drizzle with olive oil.",
      "Bake 8–12 minutes until crust is golden and cheese is bubbling. Top with fresh basil before serving.",
    ],
  },
  {
    id: 13,
    name: "Chocolate Chip Cookies",
    image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1499636136210-6f4ee915583e?w=600&q=80",
    tags: ["dessert", "baking", "sweet"],
    ingredients: [
      "flour",
      "butter",
      "sugar",
      "brown sugar",
      "eggs",
      "vanilla extract",
      "baking soda",
      "salt",
      "chocolate chips",
    ],
    instructions: [
      "Preheat oven to 375°F. Line baking sheets with parchment paper.",
      "Beat softened butter with both sugars until light and fluffy, about 3 minutes.",
      "Beat in eggs one at a time, then add vanilla.",
      "Mix in flour, baking soda, and salt until just combined. Fold in chocolate chips.",
      "Drop rounded tablespoons of dough onto prepared baking sheets, 2 inches apart.",
      "Bake 9–11 minutes until edges are golden but centers look slightly underdone. Cool on the pan 5 minutes before transferring.",
    ],
  },
  {
    id: 14,
    name: "Caprese Stuffed Chicken",
    image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1604908176997-125f25cc6f3d?w=600&q=80",
    tags: ["chicken", "italian", "dinner"],
    ingredients: [
      "chicken breast",
      "mozzarella cheese",
      "tomatoes",
      "basil",
      "garlic",
      "olive oil",
      "balsamic vinegar",
      "salt",
      "black pepper",
      "italian seasoning",
    ],
    instructions: [
      "Preheat oven to 400°F. Butterfly each chicken breast by slicing horizontally without cutting all the way through.",
      "Season inside and outside with salt, pepper, garlic, and Italian seasoning.",
      "Stuff each breast with sliced mozzarella, tomato slices, and basil leaves.",
      "Secure with toothpicks if needed. Sear in an oven-safe skillet with olive oil over high heat, 2 minutes per side.",
      "Transfer skillet to oven and bake 15–18 minutes until chicken is cooked through.",
      "Drizzle with balsamic vinegar and garnish with fresh basil. Rest 5 minutes before serving.",
    ],
  },
];

export default recipes;
